title: agrostis alpina subsp. schleicheri
intro: Agrostis alpina subsp. schleicheri, also known as Alpine Bent or Schleicher's Bent-grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-allergic activities. Agrostis alpina subsp. schleicheri can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to soothe respiratory tract issues and promote overall well-being.
